lookup.query: SELECT network_id as value, network_name as label FROM network_master ORDER BY network_name
SELECT network_id as value, network_name as label FROM network_master ORDER BY network_name

dataSource.query: SELECT IF(DATEDIFF(:end, :start) < 30, DATE_FORMAT(day, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(day, '%Y-%m')) as x_axis, SUM(sess_count) as total_sessions, SUM(IF(error_code=0, sess_count, 0)) as success_count, SUM(IF(error_code>0, sess_count, 0)) as fail_count, SUM(IF(error_code=-1, sess_count, 0)) as rejected_count FROM gtp_session_stats WHERE day BETWEEN :start AND :end AND (home_nwid = :hpmn OR :hpmn IS NULL) AND (vpmn_nwid = :vpmn OR :vpmn IS NULL) GROUP BY x_axis ORDER BY x_axis

SELECT nm.network_name as x_axis, SUM(gs.sess_count) as total_sessions, SUM(IF(gs.error_code=0, gs.sess_count, 0)) as success_count, SUM(IF(gs.error_code>0, gs.sess_count, 0)) as fail_count, SUM(IF(gs.error_code=-1, gs.sess_count, 0)) as rejected_count FROM gtp_session_stats gs JOIN oam_portal.network_master nm ON gs.vpmn_nwid = nm.network_id WHERE gs.day BETWEEN :start AND :end AND (gs.home_nwid = :hpmn OR :hpmn IS NULL) AND (gs.vpmn_nwid = :vpmn OR :vpmn IS NULL) GROUP BY nm.network_name

SELECT pgw_ip as x_axis, SUM(sess_count) as total_sessions, SUM(IF(error_code=0, sess_count, 0)) as success_count, SUM(IF(error_code>0, sess_count, 0)) as fail_count, SUM(IF(error_code=-1, sess_count, 0)) as rejected_count FROM gtp_session_stats WHERE day BETWEEN :start AND :end AND (home_nwid = :hpmn OR :hpmn IS NULL) AND (vpmn_nwid = :vpmn OR :vpmn IS NULL) GROUP BY pgw_ip

SELECT apn as x_axis, SUM(sess_count) as total_sessions, SUM(IF(error_code=0, sess_count, 0)) as success_count, SUM(IF(error_code>0, sess_count, 0)) as fail_count, SUM(IF(error_code=-1, sess_count, 0)) as rejected_count FROM gtp_session_stats WHERE day BETWEEN :start AND :end AND (home_nwid = :hpmn OR :hpmn IS NULL) AND (vpmn_nwid = :vpmn OR :vpmn IS NULL) GROUP BY apn

SELECT IF(DATEDIFF(:end, :start) < 30, DATE_FORMAT(day, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(day, '%Y-%m')) as x_axis, SUM(IF(error_code=1, sess_count, 0)) as error_1, SUM(IF(error_code=2, sess_count, 0)) as error_2, SUM(IF(error_code=3, sess_count, 0)) as error_3 FROM gtp_session_stats WHERE day BETWEEN :start AND :end AND (home_nwid = :hpmn OR :hpmn IS NULL) AND (vpmn_nwid = :vpmn OR :vpmn IS NULL) GROUP BY x_axis ORDER BY x_axis

SELECT nm.network_name as x_axis, SUM(IF(gs.error_code=1, gs.sess_count, 0)) as error_1, SUM(IF(gs.error_code=2, gs.sess_count, 0)) as error_2, SUM(IF(gs.error_code=3, gs.sess_count, 0)) as error_3 FROM gtp_session_stats gs JOIN oam_portal.network_master nm ON gs.vpmn_nwid = nm.network_id WHERE gs.day BETWEEN :start AND :end AND (gs.home_nwid = :hpmn OR :hpmn IS NULL) AND (gs.vpmn_nwid = :vpmn OR :vpmn IS NULL) GROUP BY nm.network_name

SELECT pgw_ip as x_axis, SUM(IF(error_code=1, sess_count, 0)) as error_1, SUM(IF(error_code=2, sess_count, 0)) as error_2, SUM(IF(error_code=3, sess_count, 0)) as error_3 FROM gtp_session_stats WHERE day BETWEEN :start AND :end AND (home_nwid = :hpmn OR :hpmn IS NULL) AND (vpmn_nwid = :vpmn OR :vpmn IS NULL) GROUP BY pgw_ip

SELECT apn as x_axis, SUM(IF(error_code=1, sess_count, 0)) as error_1, SUM(IF(error_code=2, sess_count, 0)) as error_2, SUM(IF(error_code=3, sess_count, 0)) as error_3 FROM gtp_session_stats WHERE day BETWEEN :start AND :end AND (home_nwid = :hpmn OR :hpmn IS NULL) AND (vpmn_nwid = :vpmn OR :vpmn IS NULL) GROUP BY apn
